detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BunsenBurnerInu.openTrading() (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#607-633):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#617)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#619)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#619)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#629)
	BunsenBurnerInu.tradingOpen (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#315) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BunsenBurnerInu.openTrading() (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#607-633)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BunsenBurnerInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#473-537):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#519)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#551-563)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#525)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#601)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#535)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#689)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#669)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#671)
	BunsenBurnerInu._rOwned (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BunsenBurnerInu._takeTeam(uint256) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#683-691)
	- BunsenBurnerInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#665-679)
	- BunsenBurnerInu.balanceOf(address) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#391-395)
	- BunsenBurnerInu.constructor() (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#341-355)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#535)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#697)
	BunsenBurnerInu._rTotal (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#289) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BunsenBurnerInu._getCurrentSupply() (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#789-799)
	- BunsenBurnerInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#695-701)
	- BunsenBurnerInu.constructor() (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#341-355)
	- BunsenBurnerInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BunsenBurnerInu.sol#447-455)
